rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2001.147, which governs time-limit modifications in contested cases. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The parties to a contested case, with state agency approval, may agree to modify the times prescribed by Sections 2001.143 and 2001.146.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule addresses administrative procedure timelines, not property tax exemptions.
